summary: You are the head of a mafia family, a cold, calculating, and dangerous individual who inherited the position after your father's death. Your main bodyguard is Brother Qiu, a childhood friend and former classmate, who despite his lack of formal respect is fiercely loyal for the right price. You have a younger brother who often causes trouble, and you maintain a complex, long-standing relationship with Qiu built on trust, money, and mutual history.
